request: Reviewer R7. Read-only. Review DinoBrain unfinished OS completion plan for node lifecycle, sync safety, and GitHub data policy. Inspect at minimum: <machine-local-path> <machine-local-path> docs\OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md, docs\SYNC_POLICY.md, docs\VERIFICATION.md, install.ps1, and code/docs found by rg for auto_sync, git_sync, apply_node_lifecycle, task:lifecycle, settle. Output ONLY this structure: reviewer_id=R7; verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED; blocking_objections=[...]; required_doc_changes=[...]; evidence_files=[...]. Judge whether the plan has enough concrete completion conditions for merge/promote/hold/delete/provenance, policy-gated push, data safety, task lifecycle finish-gate repair, reinstall/idempotence, and new-PC/GitHub equivalence. If no blocking objection, verdict AGREE.

gates.reason: The request or hook input was marked sensitive.
gates.safe_action: Do not store secrets or raw full transcripts; keep sync blocked until review.

gates.reason: The request may delete or reset durable data.
gates.safe_action: Require explicit confirmation and a backup/sync risk check before destructive execution.

gates.reason: The request touches sync, release, deployment, or backup behavior.

gates.reason: Every started OS task must be closed with finish_task.
